compounddef.title: Platform specific helper APIs in XilSecure server

briefdescription.para: PUF Red expanded keys clear mask.
Combined mask to clear KUP key and expanded (zeroize) key simultaneously.
Macros applicable for only SPARTANUPLUSAES1 device.

detaileddescription.para: Used for selecting the Key source of AES Core.

briefdescription.para: Sources to be selected to configure secure stream switch.
Sources to be selected the core to check sticky bits for AES, SHA, RSA.
Used to select the AES Encrypt/ Decrypt operation.
NIST P-192 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-256 curve value in Ecdsa.h.

NIST P-521 curve value in Ecdsa.h.

NIST P-256 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-384 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-521 curve value in Ecdsa.h.

Sources to be selected to configure secure stream switch.

detaileddescription.para: XSECURE_SSS__IGNORE is added to make enum type int irrespective of compiler used.

briefdescription.para: Sources to be selected to configure secure stream switch.

detaileddescription.para: XSECURE_SSS__IGNORE is added to make enum type int irrespective of compiler used.

briefdescription.para: Sources to be selected to configure secure stream switch.

detaileddescription.para: This function validates whether all the intermediate updates to AES engine are Q-WORD aligned or not.
This function validates if intermediate updates are 16-bytes aligned or not.
This function is not applicable for Versal_2Ve_2Vm.
This function validates whether size of the data is word aligned and if it is the last chunk size should be qword aligned.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful validation
Error code on failure
XST_SUCCESS On successful valdation
XSECURE_AES_UNALIGNED_SIZE_ERROR If unaligned size is given as input
XST_SUCCESS - On success
XSECURE_AES_UNALIGNED_SIZE_ERROR - Size is not 16-byte aligned for non-last chunk
XST_SUCCESS On successful valdation.
XSECURE_AES_UNALIGNED_SIZE_ERROR If unaligned size is given as input.
XST_SUCCESS If update is 16-bytes aligned.
XSECURE_AES_UNALIGNED_SIZE_ERROR If update is not 16-bytes aligned.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS If the data is q-word aligned for intermediate updates XST_FAILURE If the data is not q-word aligned for intermediate updates

listitem.para: Validate the Size
Validate the size based on last chunk
Validate the size is 4-byte aligned or not
Validate the size is 16-byte aligned when it is last chunk
AES engine expect all intermediate updates shall be 16-byte aligned when it is not last chunk of data. Throw an error if it is not 16 byte aligned.
Validate the size is 4-byte aligned or not
Validate the size is 16-byte aligned when it is last chunk
AES engine expect all intermediate updates shall be 16-byte aligned when it is not last chunk of data. Throw an error if it is not 16 byte aligned.
AES engine expect all intermediate updates shall be 16-byte aligned when it is not last chunk of data. Throw an error if it is not 16 byte aligned.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPmcDma *PmcDmaPtr, const XSecure_AesDmaCfg *AesDmaCfg, u32 Size, UINTPTR BaseAddress)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesPlatPmcDmaCfgAndXfer

briefdescription.para: This function configures the PMC DMA channels and transfers data.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the SRC and DEST channel endianness configurations of PMC DMA and transfers data.

parameterdescription.para: DMA SRC and DEST channel configuration

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful configuration
Error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: DMA SRC and DEST channel configuration

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful configuration
XSECURE_AES_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid
XST_FAILURE On failure

parameterdescription.para: DMA SRC and DEST channel configuration.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful configuration
XSECURE_AES_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid
XST_FAILURE On failure
Wait for the SRC DMA completion.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed
Wait for the DEST DMA completion.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed
Enable PMC DMA Src and Dst channels for byte swapping.
Sets the start address and size for both src and dest channels as per the configuration
Wait for the SRC DMA completion.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed
Wait for the DEST DMA completion.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed
Enable PMC DMA Src and Dst channels for byte swapping.
Sets the start address and size for both src and dest channels as per the configuration
Wait for the SRC DMA completion.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed
Wait for the DEST DMA completion.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed

briefdescription.para: This is a helper function to enable/disable byte swapping feature of PMC DMA.

parameterdescription.para: 1 to enable byte swapping, 0 to disable byte swapping
1 to enable byte swapping, 0 to disable byte swapping
Endianness type: 1 to enable byte swapping, 0 to disable byte swapping

listitem.para: Assert validates the input arguments

briefdescription.para: This function validates the SHA Mode and initialize SHA instance.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - Upon Success. XST_FAILURE - Upon Failure. XSECURE_SHA_INVALID_MODE_ERROR

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - Upon success
XSECURE_SHA_INVALID_PARAM - Invalid SHA mode provided
XST_SUCCESS Upon Success.
XST_FAILURE Upon Failure.
XSECURE_SHA_INVALID_MODE_ERROR In case of invalid sha mode config.
Initializes the SHA instance based on SHA Mode
Initializes the SHA instance based on SHA Mode
SHA2-256 Mode
SHA2-384 Mode
SHA2-512 Mode
SHA3-256 Mode
SHA3-384 Mode
SHAKE-512 Mode
SHAKE-256 Mode
SHAKE-256 SLH-DSA chaining Mode is not supported for Versal_2ve_2vm
SHA invalid mode
Initializes the SHA instance based on SHA Mode
SHA2-256 Mode
SHA2-384 Mode
SHA2-512 Mode
SHA3-256 Mode
SHA3-384 Mode
SHAKE-512 Mode
SHAKE-256 Mode
SHAKE-256 SLH-DSA chaining Mode
SHA invalid mode

memberdef.argsstring: (XPmcDma *DmaPtr, u64 SrcAddr, u32 Words, u8 IsLast)
memberdef.name: XSecure_ShaIssueDmaAndWait

briefdescription.para: This function issues a single PMC-DMA SRC transfer to the SHA engine and waits for the DONE bit.

parameterdescription.para: When TRUE, asserts data_inp_last on the final word.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On DMA DONE asserted within timeout.
XST_FAILURE - On DMA transfer timeout.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *InstancePtr, u64 DataAddr, u32 Size, u8 IsLastUpdate)
memberdef.name: XSecure_ShaDmaXfer

briefdescription.para: This function transfers input data to the SHA engine via PMC-DMA, using PartialData[] as a small residue buffer for sub-word and sub-block leftovers between calls.

detaileddescription.para: This function transfer data to SHA engine from DMA.

para.verbatim:
If there is no prior residue and the caller address is word- aligned, the word-aligned portion is DMA'd directly from the caller buffer and any 0..3 trailing bytes are stashed into PartialData[] for the next call.
Otherwise the caller bytes are staged through PartialData[] and DMA'd in fixed BlockLen chunks (one Keccak rate / SHA absorber block) sourced from &PartialData[0]; the trailing < BlockLen residue is deferred to SW NIST padding via XSecure_TransferNistPad. Constant DMA size and constant source address are required here to keep the PMC-DMA source channel stable across back-to-back transfers on Spartan UltraScale+.

parameterdescription.para: Size of the input data in bytes.
Flag indicating if this is the last data transfer.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - Upon successful data transfer.
XST_FAILURE - Upon DMA transfer failure.
XSECURE_SHA_INVALID_PARAM - Upon invalid parameter.
XST_SUCCESS - Upon success
XSECURE_SHA_INVALID_PARAM - Invalid parameter
XST_SUCCESS Upon Success.
XST_FAILURE Upon Failure.

inbodydescription.para: No prior residue and caller address is word-aligned.
HW IsLast only when word-aligned DMA consumes every remaining caller byte.
DMA caller buffer directly to SHA engine.
Stash 0..3 byte tail in PartialData[] for next call.
Prior residue in PartialData[] or caller address is not word-aligned.
Drain PartialData[] one BlockLen at a time; constant DMA size keeps the PMC-DMA channel stable.
Top up PartialData[] to a full BlockLen.
Copy a full BlockLen from caller into PartialData[].
HW IsLast only when this is the last block AND IsLastUpdate.
DMA exactly one BlockLen from PartialData[] to SHA engine.
Stash trailing < BlockLen bytes for next ShaUpdate or SW NIST padding.

listitem.para: Wait for PMC DMA done bit to be set.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed.
Wait for PMC DMA done bit to be set.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed.

briefdescription.para: This function configures SSS to AES engine.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful configuration
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether the requested crypto accelerator is enabled for the specified core.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - When crypto accelerators are enabled
XSECURE_ERR_CRYPTO_ACCELERATOR_DISABLED - When crypto accelerators are disabled
XSECURE_ERR_INVALID_CORE - When invalid core is specified

inbodydescription.para:
Checks whether the specified crypto core (AES, SHA, or RSA) is enabled.
For AES: returns XSECURE_ERR_CRYPTO_ACCELERATOR_DISABLED if export control is set or the AES sticky disable bit is set.
For SHA: returns XSECURE_ERR_CRYPTO_ACCELERATOR_DISABLED if the SHA sticky disable bit is set.
For RSA: returns XSECURE_ERR_CRYPTO_ACCELERATOR_DISABLED if export control is set or the RSA sticky disable bit is set.

briefdescription.para: This function is not applicable for versal.

detaileddescription.para: This function updates the crypto indicator bit of AES, SHA and ECC.

parameterdescription.para: To set or clear the bit
To set or clear the bit.

briefdescription.para: This function is not applicable for versal.

detaileddescription.para: This function updates RSA crypto indicator.

listitem.para: Not applicable for Versal_2vp_p

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaDecrypt

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_RsaInitialize and XSecure_RsaPrivateDecrypt server APIs.

parameterdescription.para: - Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_RsaInParam structure
- Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_RsaInParam structure
- Lower 32 bit address of the output data where decrypted data to be stored
- Higher 32 bit address of the output data where decrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the Rsa decryption is successful
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate internal address fields in the copied structure

briefdescription.para: This function calls respective IPI handler based on the API_ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
XST_SUCCESS - If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If any input parameter is invalid
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the handler execution is successful.
XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure.
XST_SUCCESS If the handler execution is successful.
XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure.
Call the respective API handler according to API ID
XSecure_RsaDecrypt
Call the respective API handler according to API ID
XSecure_RsaDecrypt

briefdescription.para: This function configures DMA Byte Swap based on the user input.
This function sets the SRC and DEST channel endianness configurations of PMC DMA and transfers data.

parameterdescription.para: DMA SRC and DEST channel configuration

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On successful configuration
XSECURE_AES_INVALID_PARAM - Invalid input parameter provided
XST_FAILURE - DMA transfer or timeout failure

parameterdescription.para: DMA SRC and DEST channel configuration.

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS On successful configuration.
XSECURE_AES_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.
XST_FAILURE On failure.

XST_FAILURE On failure

Wait for the SRC DMA completion.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed
Wait for the DEST DMA completion.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed
Validate input parameters
Transfers QWord aligned data
Set the src lastchunk to 0 if size of data is non-qword aligned
Transfers remaining extra bytes when size of the data(AAD/Paylod) is non-qword aligned
Wait for the DEST DMA completion.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed
Change the endianness of extra bytes if data(AAD/Payload) is non-qword aligned
If Payload size is non-qword aligned
Change the endianness for GCM Tag

briefdescription.para: This function generates random number of given size.

detaileddescription.para: This function generates Random number of given size.

parameterdescription.para: Number of random bytes to be read

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XST_INVALID_PARAM - Invalid input parameter (size is 0 or output is NULL)
XSECURE_ERR_GLITCH_DETECTED - Glitch detected during random number generation
XST_FAILURE - TRNG operation failure

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the output buffer
is the number of random bytes to be read

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On Success
XST_FAILURE On Failure
XST_INVALID_PARAM - Invalid input parameter (size is 0 or output is NULL)
XSECURE_ERR_GLITCH_DETECTED - Error when glitch is detected

parameterdescription.para: Number of random bytes to be read.

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS On Success.
XST_FAILURE On Failure.
XST_INVALID_PARAM - Invalid input parameter (size is 0 or output is NULL)
XSECURE_ERR_GLITCH_DETECTED - Error when glitch is detected.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the output buffer
is the number of random bytes to be read

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On Success
XST_FAILURE On Failure
XST_INVALID_PARAM - Invalid input parameter (size is 0 or output is NULL)
XSECURE_ERR_GLITCH_DETECTED - Error when glitch is detected.
Validate input parameters
Verify loop index is within expected bounds
Zeroise temporary buffer
Validate input parameters
Verify loop index is within expected bounds
Zeroise temporary buffer
Validate input parameters
Verify loop index is within expected bounds
Zeroise temporary buffer
Validate input parameters
Verify loop index is within expected bounds
Zeroise temporary buffer

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the trng in HRNG mode if it is not initialized and it is applicable only for Versal_2Ve_2Vm.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the trng in HRNG mode if it is not initialized and it is applicable only for VersalNet.
This function initializes the trng in HRNG mode if it is not initialized.
This function initializes the trng in HRNG mode if it is not initialized and it is applicable only for Versal_2VP.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On successful initialization
XSECURE_ERR_IN_TRNG_SELF_TESTS - TRNG self-test failure
XSECURE_ERR_TRNG_INIT_N_CONFIG - TRNG initialization and configuration failure
XST_FAILURE - On any other failure
XST_SUCCESS On Successful initialization
XST_FAILURE On Failure
XST_SUCCESS On Successful initialization.
XST_FAILURE On Failure.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates the key transfer to ASU.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On successful key transfer
XSECURE_ERR_ASU_KTE_DONE_NOT_SET - Key transfer done bit not set within timeout
Initiate the key transfer
Wait for 4msec for AES KTE DONE bit to set
Disable the key transfer

briefdescription.para: This function can copy the content of memory from 64-bit address to 32-bit address and change endianness of destination data.

parameterdescription.para: The address of the destination where content of SrcAddr memory should be copied.
The address of the source where copy should start from.
Size of memory to be copied in bytes.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success
XST_FAILURE - Memory copy or endianness reversal failure

parameterdescription.para: The address of the destination where content of SrcAddr memory should be copied.
The address of the source where copy should start from.
Size of memory to be copied in bytes.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On success and error code on failure.
XST_FAILURE In case of any failure.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the destination where content of SrcAddr memory should be copied.
is the address of the source where copy should start from.
is size of memory to be copied in bytes.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On success
XST_FAILURE On failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 RsaParamAddrLow, u32 RsaParamAddrHigh, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaPrivateOperationIpi

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_RsaInitialize and XSecure_RsaExp server API.

parameterdescription.para: Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_RsaInParam structure
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_RsaInParam structure
Lower 32 bit address of the output data where decrypted data to be stored
Higher 32 bit address of the output data where decrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the Rsa decryption is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If any input parameter is invalid
XSECURE_RSA_GEN_SIGN_FAILED_ERROR - If RSA sign generation fails
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Validate internal address fields in the copied structure
Validate prime sizes: In RSA, the modulus N = P × Q, where P and Q are prime factors. Therefore, each prime (P and Q) must be exactly half the size of the modulus.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)

briefdescription.para: This function sets the SRC and DEST channel endianness configurations of PMC DMA and transfers non-qword aligned data.

parameterdescription.para: DMA SRC and DEST channel configuration

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful configuration
XST_FAILURE On failure
Transfer the data for src and dest channels as per configuration
Wait for the SRC DMA completion.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the SRC and DEST channel endianness configurations of PMC DMA and transfers qword aligned data.

parameterdescription.para: DMA SRC and DEST channel configuration

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful configuration
XST_FAILURE On failure
Enable PMC DMA Src and Dst channels for byte swapping
Transfer the data for src and dest channels as per configuration
Wait for the SRC DMA completion.
Acknowledge the transfer has completed

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If set or clear is successful
XST_FAILURE On failure
